headlines.title: Bipartisan housing affordability bill in limbo after Trump demands passage of SAVE Act
headlines.description: Hours before heading to Capitol Hill, Trump called the big, bipartisan housing bill Republicans hope to run on in the fall “of minor importance.” Then, he canceled his plan to sign it.

headlines.title: A tale of two Democratic parties: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: The results of last night’s primaries highlighted an ongoing tale of two Democratic parties.

headlines.title: Chief of staff to fmr. NYC mayor Eric Adams arrested by FBI in alleged bribery scheme
headlines.description: Frank Carone, former chief of staff to New York City Mayor Eric Adams, has been arrested by the FBI in connection with an alleged bribery-related scheme. According to the indictment, Carone and three others, including his brother, allegedly accepted more than $100,000 in bribes in exchange for steering a contract for an emergency shelter for migrants to a hotel in Queens. NBC New York's Jonathan Dienst reports.

headlines.title: 'I don't think it was us': Trump gives update on investigation into Iran school strike
headlines.description: President Trump says he doesn't think that the U.S. was responsible for a deadly strike on a school in Iran at the beginning of the war. "I don't think it was us," Trump tells reporters during an Oval Office briefing alongside NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte.

headlines.title: House Democrat says he is ‘concerned’ NY progressive candidates could divide Democratic party
headlines.description: Rep. Gregory Meeks (D-N.Y.) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss why he’s worried about divisions in the Democratic party following the win of three progressive congressional candidates in his state.

headlines.title: Americans believe they aren’t being taught enough about democracy
headlines.description: For Thomas Jefferson, James Madison and other bold-face names struggling to bring about a new nation, an educated and informed citizenry was essential to the success of the American experiment.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Trump accuses oil companies of gas price ‘gouging,’ calls for DOJ probe
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said Wednesday that he had instructed the Justice Department to immediately probe oil companies for not lowering gas prices at the pump in line with falling costs, accusing them of “gouging” consumers.

headlines.title: Send your Supreme Court questions for Laura Jarrett
headlines.description: We’re awaiting several major decisions from the Supreme Court before the end of the 2026 term, including the high court’s rulings on birthright citizenship and whether President Donald Trump has the authority to unilaterally fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook

headlines.title: Georgia lawmakers delay a major change to the state’s voting system
headlines.description: The Republican-controlled Legislature punted a self-imposed deadline to replace the battleground state’s QR code system for counting votes to 2028.

headlines.title: Democratic Rep. Adriano Espaillat loses primary to Mamdani-backed Darializa Avila Chevalier
headlines.description: Avila Chevalier, a democratic socialist and community organizer, defeated the five-term congressman, NBC News projects.

headlines.title: Democratic Rep. Dan Goldman loses New York primary to former City Comptroller Brad Lander
headlines.description: Democratic Rep. Dan Goldman has lost his New York City primary to former City Comptroller Brad Lander, NBC News projects, following a battle that highlighted Democratic divisions over Israel and showcased the clout of Mayor Zohran Mamdani, who backed Lander
